metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.1-beta.2
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Excludes macOS AppleDouble `._*` sidecars from audio scans. - Skips common cross-platform system metadata directories. - Cleans false entries from existing indexes without deleting disk files. - Retains the 0.7 Transfer workflow introduced in Beta 1.
